domain: Analytics SaaS Dashboard for Amazon Ads

mono.usage: MUST be used for all KPI values, table data, and financial metrics.

layout.strategy: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID
layout.borders: Cardless layout, max 4px border-radius (rounded-sm). Use 1px solid borders (border-border).
layout.spacing: Dense padding inside widgets (p-4 or p-6). No large empty spaces.
layout.alignment: Strictly rectangular, dense style. Professional finance tool feel.

components.buttons: Square or slightly rounded (rounded-sm), flat colors, high contrast hover states.
components.inputs: Flat, 1px solid border, square edges, clear focus rings (ring-1 ring-primary).
components.tables: Dense, striped rows, mono font for numbers, sticky header. No excessive padding. Use Shadcn Table.
components.charts: Recharts with pure geometric lines. No gradient fills under lines. Use solid bright colors (Primary, Warning, Error). Disable rounded corners on tooltips.
components.panels: AI Recommendations panel should use a 'Retro-Futurism' terminal look or solid 'Tracing Beam' border to distinguish it from standard data. Avoid purple-on-white slop.
components.tabs: Flat, unstyled active states with a sharp 2px bottom border or solid high-contrast background.

user_avatar.description: User profile avatar for the header.

amazon_icon_placeholder.description: Placeholder for Amazon logo or marketplace identifier, if an image is absolutely required.

instructions_to_main_agent: Design specifically for Light AND Dark mode, avoiding purple-on-white AI default styles.
Implement language selection (ES, EN, IT) in the header using a Shadcn Select or DropdownMenu.
The CSV Import area should be a prominent, drag-and-drop styled zone with dashed borders. Support Search Term, Campaign, Placement reports.
Build a KPI grid (Impressions, Clicks, CTR, Spend, Sales, ACoS, ROAS, Orders, CPC). Use 'IBM Plex Mono' for all metric numbers.
Ensure the layout is highly dense and rectangular (finance/analytics native tool vibe).
Include a 'Marketplace' selector in the header (US, ES, UK, DE, FR, IT, MX).
For the charts (Spend vs Sales, ACoS by Campaign, Top Search terms), use Recharts with sharp line types and solid fills.
Build a Campaigns table with filtering and sorting capabilities.
Build a Search Terms table with negative keyword suggestions feature.
Include an 'AI Recommendations' panel powered by 'Claude Sonnet 4.5' insights. Make it distinct via its border (e.g., Warning color or animated border).
Implement an Import History and saved datasets view (mocking MongoDB).
All interactive elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="import-csv-button"`).
Avoid unnecessary shadows. Rely on 1px solid borders for separation.
Main application language should be ES (Spanish) as per instructions.
